rationale: The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption is unrelated to Educ. Code §38.002, which governs student immunization recordkeeping and reporting. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: Each public school shall keep an individual immunization record during the period of attendance for each student admitted.
_note: Rule text concerns immunization records; proposed change concerns property tax homestead exemption. No intersection.
